original_query: select sum(l_extendedprice) / 7.0 as avg_yearly from lineitem, part where p_partkey = l_partkey and p_brand = 'Brand#23' and p_container = 'MED BOX' and l_quantity < ( select 0.2 * avg(l_quantity) from lineitem where l_partkey = p_partkey );
rewritten_query: SELECT SUM(lineitem19.l_extendedprice) / 7.0 AS avg_yearly FROM lineitem AS lineitem19 INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM part WHERE p_brand = 'Brand#23' AND p_container = 'MED BOX') AS t51 ON lineitem19.l_partkey = t51.p_partkey INNER JOIN (SELECT l_partkey, AVG(l_quantity) AS $f1 FROM lineitem GROUP BY l_partkey) AS t52 ON t51.p_partkey = t52.l_partkey AND lineitem19.l_quantity < 0.2 * t52.$f1;

original_query: select s_name, s_address from supplier, nation where s_suppkey in ( select ps_suppkey from partsupp where ps_partkey in ( select p_partkey from part where p_name like 'forest%' ) and ps_availqty > ( select 0.5 * sum(l_quantity) from lineitem where l_partkey = ps_partkey and l_suppkey = ps_suppkey and l_shipdate >= date '1994-01-01' and l_shipdate < date '1994-01-01' + interval '1' year ) ) and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_name = 'CANADA' order by s_name;
rewritten_query: SELECT supplier93.s_name, supplier93.s_address FROM supplier AS supplier93 INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM nation WHERE n_name = 'CANADA') AS t1109 ON supplier93.s_nationkey = t1109.n_nationkey INNER JOIN (SELECT partsupp93.ps_suppkey FROM partsupp AS partsupp93 INNER JOIN (SELECT p_partkey FROM part WHERE p_name LIKE 'forest%' GROUP BY p_partkey) AS t1112 ON partsupp93.ps_partkey = t1112.p_partkey INNER JOIN (SELECT l_partkey, l_suppkey, SUM(l_quantity) AS $f2 FROM lineitem WHERE l_shipdate >= DATE '1994-01-01' AND l_shipdate < (DATE '1994-01-01' + INTERVAL '1' YEAR) GROUP BY l_partkey, l_suppkey) AS t1115 ON partsupp93.ps_partkey = t1115.l_partkey AND partsupp93.ps_suppkey = t1115.l_suppkey AND partsupp93.ps_availqty > 0.5 * t1115.$f2 GROUP BY partsupp93.ps_suppkey) AS t1117 ON supplier93.s_suppkey = t1117.ps_suppkey ORDER BY supplier93.s_name;

original_query: select s_acctbal, s_name, n_name, p_partkey, p_mfgr, s_address, s_phone, s_comment from part, supplier, partsupp, nation, region where p_partkey = ps_partkey and s_suppkey = ps_suppkey and p_size = 15 and p_type like '%BRASS' and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_regionkey = r_regionkey and r_name = 'EUROPE' and ps_supplycost = ( select min(ps_supplycost) from partsupp, supplier, nation, region where p_partkey = ps_partkey and s_suppkey = ps_suppkey and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_regionkey = r_regionkey and r_name = 'EUROPE' ) order by s_acctbal desc, n_name, s_name, p_partkey LIMIT 100;
rewritten_query: SELECT supplier47.s_acctbal, supplier47.s_name, nation47.n_name, t260.p_partkey, t260.p_mfgr, supplier47.s_address, supplier47.s_phone, supplier47.s_comment FROM (SELECT * FROM part WHERE p_size = 15 AND p_type LIKE '%BRASS') AS t260 CROSS JOIN supplier AS supplier47 INNER JOIN partsupp AS partsupp47 ON t260.p_partkey = partsupp47.ps_partkey AND supplier47.s_suppkey = partsupp47.ps_suppkey INNER JOIN nation AS nation47 ON supplier47.s_nationkey = nation47.n_nationkey INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM region WHERE r_name = 'EUROPE') AS t261 ON nation47.n_regionkey = t261.r_regionkey INNER JOIN (SELECT t266.ps_partkey, MIN(t266.EXPR$0) AS EXPR$0 FROM (SELECT t264.ps_partkey, t265.n_regionkey, MIN(t264.EXPR$0) AS EXPR$0 FROM (SELECT t262.ps_partkey, t263.s_nationkey, MIN(t262.EXPR$0) AS EXPR$0 FROM (SELECT ps_partkey, ps_suppkey, MIN(ps_supplycost) AS EXPR$0 FROM partsupp GROUP BY ps_partkey, ps_suppkey) AS t262 INNER JOIN (SELECT s_suppkey, s_nationkey FROM supplier GROUP BY s_suppkey, s_nationkey) AS t263 ON t262.ps_suppkey = t263.s_suppkey GROUP BY t262.ps_partkey, t263.s_nationkey) AS t264 INNER JOIN (SELECT n_nationkey, n_regionkey FROM nation GROUP BY n_nationkey, n_regionkey) AS t265 ON t264.s_nationkey = t265.n_nationkey GROUP BY t264.ps_partkey, t265.n_regionkey) AS t266 INNER JOIN (SELECT r_regionkey FROM region WHERE r_name = 'EUROPE' GROUP BY r_regionkey) AS t268 ON t266.n_regionkey = t268.r_regionkey GROUP BY t266.ps_partkey) AS t269 ON t260.p_partkey = t269.ps_partkey AND partsupp47.ps_supplycost = t269.EXPR$0 ORDER BY supplier47.s_acctbal DESC, nation47.n_name, supplier47.s_name, t260.p_partkey FETCH NEXT 100 ROWS ONLY;

original_query: select c_custkey, c_name, sum(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) as revenue, c_acctbal, n_name, c_address, c_phone, c_comment from customer, orders, lineitem, nation where c_custkey = o_custkey and l_orderkey = o_orderkey and o_orderdate >= date '1993-10-01' and o_orderdate < date '1993-10-01' + interval '3month' and l_returnflag = 'R' and c_nationkey = n_nationkey group by c_custkey, c_name, c_acctbal, c_phone, n_name, c_address, c_comment order by revenue desc;

select 100.00 * sum(case when p_type like 'PROMO%' then l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) else 0 end) / sum(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) as promo_revenue from lineitem, part where l_partkey = p_partkey and l_shipdate >= date '1995-09-01' and l_shipdate < date '1995-09-01' + interval '1month';

select n_name, sum(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) as revenue from customer, orders, lineitem, supplier, nation, region where c_custkey = o_custkey and l_orderkey = o_orderkey and l_suppkey = s_suppkey and c_nationkey = s_nationkey and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_regionkey = r_regionkey and r_name = 'ASIA' and o_orderdate >= date '1994-01-01' and o_orderdate < date '1994-01-01' + interval '1year' group by n_name order by revenue desc;

select l_shipmode, sum(case when o_orderpriority = '1-URGENT' or o_orderpriority = '2-HIGH' then 1 else 0 end) as high_line_count, sum(case when o_orderpriority <> '1-URGENT' and o_orderpriority <> '2-HIGH' then 1 else 0 end) as low_line_count from orders, lineitem where o_orderkey = l_orderkey and l_shipmode in ('MAIL', 'SHIP') and l_commitdate < l_receiptdate and l_shipdate < l_commitdate and l_receiptdate >= date '1994-01-01' and l_receiptdate < date '1994-01-01' + interval '1y' group by l_shipmode order by l_shipmode;

select s_name, count(*) as numwait from supplier, lineitem l1, orders, nation where s_suppkey = l1.l_suppkey and o_orderkey = l1.l_orderkey and o_orderstatus = 'F' and l1.l_receiptdate > l1.l_commitdate and exists ( select * from lineitem l2 where l2.l_orderkey = l1.l_orderkey and l2.l_suppkey <> l1.l_suppkey ) and not exists ( select * from lineitem l3 where l3.l_orderkey = l1.l_orderkey and l3.l_suppkey <> l1.l_suppkey and l3.l_receiptdate > l3.l_commitdate ) and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_name = 'SAUDI ARABIA' group by s_name order by numwait desc, s_name LIMIT 100;
rewritten_query: SELECT supplier47.s_acctbal, supplier47.s_name, nation47.n_name, t260.p_partkey, t260.p_mfgr, supplier47.s_address, supplier47.s_phone, supplier47.s_comment FROM (SELECT * FROM part WHERE p_size = 15 AND p_type LIKE '%BRASS') AS t260 CROSS JOIN supplier AS supplier47 INNER JOIN partsupp AS partsupp47 ON t260.p_partkey = partsupp47.ps_partkey AND supplier47.s_suppkey = partsupp47.ps_suppkey INNER JOIN nation AS nation47 ON supplier47.s_nationkey = nation47.n_nationkey INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM region WHERE r_name = 'EUROPE') AS t261 ON nation47.n_regionkey = t261.r_regionkey INNER JOIN (SELECT t266.ps_partkey, MIN(t266.EXPR$0) AS EXPR$0 FROM (SELECT t264.ps_partkey, t265.n_regionkey, MIN(t264.EXPR$0) AS EXPR$0 FROM (SELECT t262.ps_partkey, t263.s_nationkey, MIN(t262.EXPR$0) AS EXPR$0 FROM (SELECT ps_partkey, ps_suppkey, MIN(ps_supplycost) AS EXPR$0 FROM partsupp GROUP BY ps_partkey, ps_suppkey) AS t262 INNER JOIN (SELECT s_suppkey, s_nationkey FROM supplier GROUP BY s_suppkey, s_nationkey) AS t263 ON t262.ps_suppkey = t263.s_suppkey GROUP BY t262.ps_partkey, t263.s_nationkey) AS t264 INNER JOIN (SELECT n_nationkey, n_regionkey FROM nation GROUP BY n_nationkey, n_regionkey) AS t265 ON t264.s_nationkey = t265.n_nationkey GROUP BY t264.ps_partkey, t265.n_regionkey) AS t266 INNER JOIN (SELECT r_regionkey FROM region WHERE r_name = 'EUROPE' GROUP BY r_regionkey) AS t268 ON t266.n_regionkey = t268.r_regionkey GROUP BY t266.ps_partkey) AS t269 ON t260.p_partkey = t269.ps_partkey AND partsupp47.ps_supplycost = t269.EXPR$0 ORDER BY supplier47.s_acctbal DESC, nation47.n_name, supplier47.s_name, t260.p_partkey FETCH NEXT 100 ROWS ONLY;

original_query: select o_orderpriority, count(*) as order_count from orders where o_orderdate >= date '1993-07-01'and o_orderdate < date '1993-07-01' + interval '3month' and exists (select * from lineitem where l_orderkey = o_orderkey and l_commitdate < l_receiptdate) group by o_orderpriority order by o_orderpriority; ;

select l_returnflag, l_linestatus, sum(l_quantity) as sum_qty, sum(l_extendedprice) as sum_base_price, sum(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) as sum_disc_price, sum(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) * (1 + l_tax)) as sum_charge, avg(l_quantity) as avg_qty, avg(l_extendedprice) as avg_price, avg(l_discount) as avg_disc, count(*) as count_order from lineitem where l_shipdate <= date '1998-12-01' - interval '90d' group by l_returnflag, l_linestatus order by l_returnflag, l_linestatus;

select cntrycode, count(*) as numcust, sum(c_acctbal) as totacctbal from ( select substring(c_phone from 1 for 2) as cntrycode, c_acctbal from customer where substring(c_phone from 1 for 2) in ('13', '31', '23', '29', '30', '18', '17') and c_acctbal > ( select avg(c_acctbal) from customer where c_acctbal > 0.00 and substring(c_phone from 1 for 2) in ('13', '31', '23', '29', '30', '18', '17') ) and not exists ( select * from orders where o_custkey = c_custkey ) ) as custsale group by cntrycode order by cntrycode LIMIT 100;
rewritten_query: SELECT SUBSTRING(t288.c_phone FROM CASE WHEN 1 + (CHAR_LENGTH(t288.c_phone) + 1) < 1 THEN CHAR_LENGTH(t288.c_phone) + 1 ELSE 1 END FOR 2) AS cntrycode, COUNT(*) AS numcust, SUM(t288.c_acctbal) AS totacctbal FROM (SELECT * FROM customer WHERE SUBSTRING(c_phone FROM CASE WHEN 1 + (CHAR_LENGTH(c_phone) + 1) < 1 THEN CHAR_LENGTH(c_phone) + 1 ELSE 1 END FOR 2) = '13' OR (SUBSTRING(c_phone FROM CASE WHEN 1 + (CHAR_LENGTH(c_phone) + 1) < 1 THEN CHAR_LENGTH(c_phone) + 1 ELSE 1 END FOR 2) = '31' OR SUBSTRING(c_phone FROM CASE WHEN 1 + (CHAR_LENGTH(c_phone) + 1) < 1 THEN CHAR_LENGTH(c_phone) + 1 ELSE 1 END FOR 2) = '23') OR (SUBSTRING(c_phone FROM CASE WHEN 1 + (CHAR_LENGTH(c_phone) + 1) < 1 THEN CHAR_LENGTH(c_phone) + 1 ELSE 1 END FOR 2) = '29' OR SUBSTRING(c_phone FROM CASE WHEN 1 + (CHAR_LENGTH(c_phone) + 1) < 1 THEN CHAR_LENGTH(c_phone) + 1 ELSE 1 END FOR 2) = '30' OR (SUBSTRING(c_phone FROM CASE WHEN 1 + (CHAR_LENGTH(c_phone) + 1) < 1 THEN CHAR_LENGTH(c_phone) + 1 ELSE 1 END FOR 2) = '18' OR SUBSTRING(c_phone FROM CASE WHEN 1 + (CHAR_LENGTH(c_phone) + 1) < 1 THEN CHAR_LENGTH(c_phone) + 1 ELSE 1 END FOR 2) = '17'))) AS t288 INNER JOIN (SELECT AVG(c_acctbal) AS EXPR$0 FROM customer WHERE c_acctbal > 0.00 AND (SUBSTRING(c_phone FROM CASE WHEN 1 + (CHAR_LENGTH(c_phone) + 1) < 1 THEN CHAR_LENGTH(c_phone) + 1 ELSE 1 END FOR 2) = '13' OR (SUBSTRING(c_phone FROM CASE WHEN 1 + (CHAR_LENGTH(c_phone) + 1) < 1 THEN CHAR_LENGTH(c_phone) + 1 ELSE 1 END FOR 2) = '31' OR SUBSTRING(c_phone FROM CASE WHEN 1 + (CHAR_LENGTH(c_phone) + 1) < 1 THEN CHAR_LENGTH(c_phone) + 1 ELSE 1 END FOR 2) = '23') OR (SUBSTRING(c_phone FROM CASE WHEN 1 + (CHAR_LENGTH(c_phone) + 1) < 1 THEN CHAR_LENGTH(c_phone) + 1 ELSE 1 END FOR 2) = '29' OR SUBSTRING(c_phone FROM CASE WHEN 1 + (CHAR_LENGTH(c_phone) + 1) < 1 THEN CHAR_LENGTH(c_phone) + 1 ELSE 1 END FOR 2) = '30' OR (SUBSTRING(c_phone FROM CASE WHEN 1 + (CHAR_LENGTH(c_phone) + 1) < 1 THEN CHAR_LENGTH(c_phone) + 1 ELSE 1 END FOR 2) = '18' OR SUBSTRING(c_phone FROM CASE WHEN 1 + (CHAR_LENGTH(c_phone) + 1) < 1 THEN CHAR_LENGTH(c_phone) + 1 ELSE 1 END FOR 2) = '17')))) AS t290 ON t288.c_acctbal > t290.EXPR$0 LEFT JOIN (SELECT o_custkey, MIN(TRUE) AS $f1 FROM orders GROUP BY o_custkey) AS t292 ON t288.c_custkey = t292.o_custkey WHERE t292.$f1 IS NULL GROUP BY SUBSTRING(t288.c_phone FROM CASE WHEN 1 + (CHAR_LENGTH(t288.c_phone) + 1) < 1 THEN CHAR_LENGTH(t288.c_phone) + 1 ELSE 1 END FOR 2) ORDER BY SUBSTRING(t288.c_phone FROM CASE WHEN 1 + (CHAR_LENGTH(t288.c_phone) + 1) < 1 THEN CHAR_LENGTH(t288.c_phone) + 1 ELSE 1 END FOR 2) FETCH NEXT 100 ROWS ONLY;

original_query: select p_brand, p_type, p_size, count(distinct ps_suppkey) as supplier_cnt from partsupp, part where p_partkey = ps_partkey and p_brand <> 'Brand#45' and p_type not like 'MEDIUM POLISHED%' and p_size in (49, 14, 23, 45, 19, 3, 36, 9) and ps_suppkey not in ( select s_suppkey from supplier where s_comment like '%Customer%Complaints%' ) group by p_brand, p_type, p_size order by supplier_cnt desc, p_brand, p_type, p_size;
rewritten_query: SELECT t332.p_brand, t332.p_type, t332.p_size, COUNT(t332.ps_suppkey) AS supplier_cnt FROM (SELECT t327.ps_suppkey, t327.p_brand, t327.p_type, t327.p_size FROM (SELECT partsupp35.ps_partkey, partsupp35.ps_suppkey, partsupp35.ps_availqty, partsupp35.ps_supplycost, partsupp35.ps_comment, t326.p_partkey, t326.p_name, t326.p_mfgr, t326.p_brand, t326.p_type, t326.p_size, t326.p_container, t326.p_retailprice, t326.p_comment, partsupp35.ps_suppkey AS ps_suppkey0 FROM partsupp AS partsupp35 INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM part WHERE CAST(p_brand AS CHAR(8)) <> 'Brand#45' AND p_size IN (3, 9, 14, 19, 23, 36, 45, 49) AND p_type NOT LIKE 'MEDIUM POLISHED%') AS t326 ON partsupp35.ps_partkey = t326.p_partkey) AS t327 LEFT JOIN (SELECT s_suppkey, MIN(TRUE) AS $f1 FROM supplier WHERE s_comment LIKE '%Customer%Complaints%' GROUP BY s_suppkey) AS t330 ON t327.ps_suppkey0 = t330.s_suppkey WHERE t330.$f1 IS NOT TRUE GROUP BY t327.ps_suppkey, t327.p_brand, t327.p_type, t327.p_size) AS t332 GROUP BY t332.p_brand, t332.p_type, t332.p_size ORDER BY COUNT(t332.ps_suppkey) DESC, t332.p_brand, t332.p_type, t332.p_size;

original_query: select o_year, sum(case when nation = 'BRAZIL' then volume else 0 end) / sum(volume) as mkt_share from ( select extract(year from o_orderdate) as o_year, l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) as volume, n2.n_name as nation from part, supplier, lineitem, orders, customer, nation n1, nation n2, region where p_partkey = l_partkey and s_suppkey = l_suppkey and l_orderkey = o_orderkey and o_custkey = c_custkey and c_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey and n1.n_regionkey = r_regionkey and r_name = 'AMERICA' and s_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey and o_orderdate between date '1995-01-01' and date '1996-12-31' and p_type = 'ECONOMY ANODIZED STEEL' ) as all_nations group by o_year order by o_year;
rewritten_query: SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM t305.o_orderdate) AS o_year, SUM(CASE WHEN nation74.n_name = 'BRAZIL' THEN lineitem36.l_extendedprice * (1 - lineitem36.l_discount) ELSE 0 END) / SUM(lineitem36.l_extendedprice * (1 - lineitem36.l_discount)) AS mkt_share FROM (SELECT * FROM part WHERE p_type = 'ECONOMY ANODIZED STEEL') AS t304 CROSS JOIN supplier AS supplier36 INNER JOIN lineitem AS lineitem36 ON t304.p_partkey = lineitem36.l_partkey AND supplier36.s_suppkey = lineitem36.l_suppkey INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM orders WHERE o_orderdate >= DATE '1995-01-01' AND o_orderdate <= DATE '1996-12-31') AS t305 ON lineitem36.l_orderkey = t305.o_orderkey INNER JOIN customer AS customer36 ON t305.o_custkey = customer36.c_custkey INNER JOIN nation AS nation73 ON customer36.c_nationkey = nation73.n_nationkey INNER JOIN nation AS nation74 ON supplier36.s_nationkey = nation74.n_nationkey INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM region WHERE r_name = 'AMERICA') AS t306 ON nation73.n_regionkey = t306.r_regionkey GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM t305.o_orderdate) ORDER BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM t305.o_orderdate);

original_query: select nation, o_year, sum(amount) as sum_profit from ( select n_name as nation, extract(year from o_orderdate) as o_year, l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) - ps_supplycost * l_quantity as amount from part,supplier,lineitem,partsupp,orders,nation where s_suppkey = l_suppkey and ps_suppkey = l_suppkey and ps_partkey = l_partkey and p_partkey = l_partkey and o_orderkey = l_orderkey and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and p_name like '%green%' ) as profit group by nation, o_year order by nation, o_year desc;
rewritten_query: SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM t305.o_orderdate) AS o_year, SUM(CASE WHEN nation74.n_name = 'BRAZIL' THEN lineitem36.l_extendedprice * (1 - lineitem36.l_discount) ELSE 0 END) / SUM(lineitem36.l_extendedprice * (1 - lineitem36.l_discount)) AS mkt_share FROM (SELECT * FROM part WHERE p_type = 'ECONOMY ANODIZED STEEL') AS t304 CROSS JOIN supplier AS supplier36 INNER JOIN lineitem AS lineitem36 ON t304.p_partkey = lineitem36.l_partkey AND supplier36.s_suppkey = lineitem36.l_suppkey INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM orders WHERE o_orderdate >= DATE '1995-01-01' AND o_orderdate <= DATE '1996-12-31') AS t305 ON lineitem36.l_orderkey = t305.o_orderkey INNER JOIN customer AS customer36 ON t305.o_custkey = customer36.c_custkey INNER JOIN nation AS nation73 ON customer36.c_nationkey = nation73.n_nationkey INNER JOIN nation AS nation74 ON supplier36.s_nationkey = nation74.n_nationkey INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM region WHERE r_name = 'AMERICA') AS t306 ON nation73.n_regionkey = t306.r_regionkey GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM t305.o_orderdate) ORDER BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM t305.o_orderdate);

original_query: select l_orderkey, sum(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) as revenue, o_orderdate, o_shippriority from customer, orders, lineitem where c_mktsegment = 'BUILDING' and c_custkey = o_custkey and l_orderkey = o_orderkey and o_orderdate < date '1995-03-15' and l_shipdate > date '1995-03-15' group by l_orderkey, o_orderdate, o_shippriority order by revenue desc, o_orderdate LIMIT 10;
rewritten_query: SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM t305.o_orderdate) AS o_year, SUM(CASE WHEN nation74.n_name = 'BRAZIL' THEN lineitem36.l_extendedprice * (1 - lineitem36.l_discount) ELSE 0 END) / SUM(lineitem36.l_extendedprice * (1 - lineitem36.l_discount)) AS mkt_share FROM (SELECT * FROM part WHERE p_type = 'ECONOMY ANODIZED STEEL') AS t304 CROSS JOIN supplier AS supplier36 INNER JOIN lineitem AS lineitem36 ON t304.p_partkey = lineitem36.l_partkey AND supplier36.s_suppkey = lineitem36.l_suppkey INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM orders WHERE o_orderdate >= DATE '1995-01-01' AND o_orderdate <= DATE '1996-12-31') AS t305 ON lineitem36.l_orderkey = t305.o_orderkey INNER JOIN customer AS customer36 ON t305.o_custkey = customer36.c_custkey INNER JOIN nation AS nation73 ON customer36.c_nationkey = nation73.n_nationkey INNER JOIN nation AS nation74 ON supplier36.s_nationkey = nation74.n_nationkey INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM region WHERE r_name = 'AMERICA') AS t306 ON nation73.n_regionkey = t306.r_regionkey GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM t305.o_orderdate) ORDER BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM t305.o_orderdate);

original_query: select sum(l_extendedprice* (1 - l_discount)) as revenue from lineitem, part where ( p_partkey = l_partkey and p_brand = 'Brand#12' and p_container in ('SM CASE', 'SM BOX', 'SM PACK', 'SM PKG') and l_quantity >= 1 and l_quantity <= 1 + 10 and p_size between 1 and 5 and l_shipmode in ('AIR', 'AIR REG') and l_shipinstruct = 'DELIVER IN PERSON' ) or ( p_partkey = l_partkey and p_brand = 'Brand#23' and p_container in ('MED BAG', 'MED BOX', 'MED PKG', 'MED PACK') and l_quantity >= 10 and l_quantity <= 10 + 10 and p_size between 1 and 10 and l_shipmode in ('AIR', 'AIR REG') and l_shipinstruct = 'DELIVER IN PERSON' ) or ( p_partkey = l_partkey and p_brand = 'Brand#34' and p_container in ('LG CASE', 'LG BOX', 'LG PACK', 'LG PKG') and l_quantity >= 20 and l_quantity <= 20 + 10 and p_size between 1 and 15 and l_shipmode in ('AIR', 'AIR REG') and l_shipinstruct = 'DELIVER IN PERSON' );
rewritten_query: SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM t305.o_orderdate) AS o_year, SUM(CASE WHEN nation74.n_name = 'BRAZIL' THEN lineitem36.l_extendedprice * (1 - lineitem36.l_discount) ELSE 0 END) / SUM(lineitem36.l_extendedprice * (1 - lineitem36.l_discount)) AS mkt_share FROM (SELECT * FROM part WHERE p_type = 'ECONOMY ANODIZED STEEL') AS t304 CROSS JOIN supplier AS supplier36 INNER JOIN lineitem AS lineitem36 ON t304.p_partkey = lineitem36.l_partkey AND supplier36.s_suppkey = lineitem36.l_suppkey INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM orders WHERE o_orderdate >= DATE '1995-01-01' AND o_orderdate <= DATE '1996-12-31') AS t305 ON lineitem36.l_orderkey = t305.o_orderkey INNER JOIN customer AS customer36 ON t305.o_custkey = customer36.c_custkey INNER JOIN nation AS nation73 ON customer36.c_nationkey = nation73.n_nationkey INNER JOIN nation AS nation74 ON supplier36.s_nationkey = nation74.n_nationkey INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM region WHERE r_name = 'AMERICA') AS t306 ON nation73.n_regionkey = t306.r_regionkey GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM t305.o_orderdate) ORDER BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM t305.o_orderdate);

original_query: select c_name, c_custkey, o_orderkey, o_orderdate, o_totalprice, sum(l_quantity) from customer, orders, lineitem where o_orderkey in ( select l_orderkey from lineitem group by l_orderkey having sum(l_quantity) > 300 ) and c_custkey = o_custkey and o_orderkey = l_orderkey group by c_name, c_custkey, o_orderkey, o_orderdate, o_totalprice order by o_totalprice desc, o_orderdate;
rewritten_query: SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM t305.o_orderdate) AS o_year, SUM(CASE WHEN nation74.n_name = 'BRAZIL' THEN lineitem36.l_extendedprice * (1 - lineitem36.l_discount) ELSE 0 END) / SUM(lineitem36.l_extendedprice * (1 - lineitem36.l_discount)) AS mkt_share FROM (SELECT * FROM part WHERE p_type = 'ECONOMY ANODIZED STEEL') AS t304 CROSS JOIN supplier AS supplier36 INNER JOIN lineitem AS lineitem36 ON t304.p_partkey = lineitem36.l_partkey AND supplier36.s_suppkey = lineitem36.l_suppkey INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM orders WHERE o_orderdate >= DATE '1995-01-01' AND o_orderdate <= DATE '1996-12-31') AS t305 ON lineitem36.l_orderkey = t305.o_orderkey INNER JOIN customer AS customer36 ON t305.o_custkey = customer36.c_custkey INNER JOIN nation AS nation73 ON customer36.c_nationkey = nation73.n_nationkey INNER JOIN nation AS nation74 ON supplier36.s_nationkey = nation74.n_nationkey INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM region WHERE r_name = 'AMERICA') AS t306 ON nation73.n_regionkey = t306.r_regionkey GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM t305.o_orderdate) ORDER BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM t305.o_orderdate);

original_query: select supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year, sum(volume) as revenue from ( select n1.n_name as supp_nation, n2.n_name as cust_nation, extract(year from l_shipdate) as l_year, l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) as volume from supplier, lineitem, orders, customer, nation n1, nation n2 where s_suppkey = l_suppkey and o_orderkey = l_orderkey and c_custkey = o_custkey and s_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey and c_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey and ( (n1.n_name = 'FRANCE' and n2.n_name = 'GERMANY') or (n1.n_name = 'GERMANY' and n2.n_name = 'FRANCE') ) and l_shipdate between date '1995-01-01' and date '1996-12-31' ) as shipping group by supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year order by supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year;
rewritten_query: SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM t305.o_orderdate) AS o_year, SUM(CASE WHEN nation74.n_name = 'BRAZIL' THEN lineitem36.l_extendedprice * (1 - lineitem36.l_discount) ELSE 0 END) / SUM(lineitem36.l_extendedprice * (1 - lineitem36.l_discount)) AS mkt_share FROM (SELECT * FROM part WHERE p_type = 'ECONOMY ANODIZED STEEL') AS t304 CROSS JOIN supplier AS supplier36 INNER JOIN lineitem AS lineitem36 ON t304.p_partkey = lineitem36.l_partkey AND supplier36.s_suppkey = lineitem36.l_suppkey INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM orders WHERE o_orderdate >= DATE '1995-01-01' AND o_orderdate <= DATE '1996-12-31') AS t305 ON lineitem36.l_orderkey = t305.o_orderkey INNER JOIN customer AS customer36 ON t305.o_custkey = customer36.c_custkey INNER JOIN nation AS nation73 ON customer36.c_nationkey = nation73.n_nationkey INNER JOIN nation AS nation74 ON supplier36.s_nationkey = nation74.n_nationkey INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM region WHERE r_name = 'AMERICA') AS t306 ON nation73.n_regionkey = t306.r_regionkey GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM t305.o_orderdate) ORDER BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM t305.o_orderdate);

original_query: select c_count, count(*) as custdist from ( select c_custkey, count(o_orderkey) from customer left outer join orders on c_custkey = o_custkey and o_comment not like '%special%requests%' group by c_custkey ) as c_orders (c_custkey, c_count) group by c_count order by custdist desc, c_count desc;
rewritten_query: SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM t305.o_orderdate) AS o_year, SUM(CASE WHEN nation74.n_name = 'BRAZIL' THEN lineitem36.l_extendedprice * (1 - lineitem36.l_discount) ELSE 0 END) / SUM(lineitem36.l_extendedprice * (1 - lineitem36.l_discount)) AS mkt_share FROM (SELECT * FROM part WHERE p_type = 'ECONOMY ANODIZED STEEL') AS t304 CROSS JOIN supplier AS supplier36 INNER JOIN lineitem AS lineitem36 ON t304.p_partkey = lineitem36.l_partkey AND supplier36.s_suppkey = lineitem36.l_suppkey INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM orders WHERE o_orderdate >= DATE '1995-01-01' AND o_orderdate <= DATE '1996-12-31') AS t305 ON lineitem36.l_orderkey = t305.o_orderkey INNER JOIN customer AS customer36 ON t305.o_custkey = customer36.c_custkey INNER JOIN nation AS nation73 ON customer36.c_nationkey = nation73.n_nationkey INNER JOIN nation AS nation74 ON supplier36.s_nationkey = nation74.n_nationkey INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM region WHERE r_name = 'AMERICA') AS t306 ON nation73.n_regionkey = t306.r_regionkey GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM t305.o_orderdate) ORDER BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM t305.o_orderdate);

original_query: select ps_partkey, sum(ps_supplycost * ps_availqty) as value from partsupp, supplier, nation where ps_suppkey = s_suppkey and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_name = 'GERMANY' group by ps_partkey having sum(ps_supplycost * ps_availqty) > ( select sum(ps_supplycost * ps_availqty) * 0.0001000000 from partsupp, supplier, nation where ps_suppkey = s_suppkey and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_name = 'GERMANY' ) order by value desc;

select sum(l_extendedprice * l_discount) as revenue from lineitem where l_shipdate >= date '1994-01-01' and l_shipdate < date '1994-01-01' + interval '1year' and l_discount between .06 - 0.01 and .06 + 0.01 and l_quantity < 24;
